item.title: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s long-term strength. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Baazar Style Retail Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Baazar Style Retail Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s medium-term momentum and raises concerns about its long-term price strength amid challenging market conditions. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Oceanic Foods Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Oceanic Foods Ltd, a micro-cap player in the FMCG sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-day moving average, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend and long-term weakness in the stock’s price momentum. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Porwal Auto Components Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Porwal Auto Components Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term outlook. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Anupam Finserv Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Anupam Finserv Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend and raises concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term momentum. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Sastasundar Ventures Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Sastasundar Ventures Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Healthcare Services sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term momentum and investor sentiment. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Modi Rubber Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Modi Rubber Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Tyres & Rubber Products sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential deterioration in the stock’s trend and raises concerns about sustained bearish momentum in the near to medium term. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Apollo Tyres Ltd. Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Apollo Tyres Ltd., a prominent player in the Tyres & Rubber Products sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its medium to long-term outlook. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Punjab Communications Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Punjab Communications Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend and long-term weakness in the stock’s price trajectory. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Escorts Kubota Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Escorts Kubota Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its near- to medium-term outlook. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Power Finance Corporation Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Power Finance Corporation Ltd (PFC) has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-DMA. This development suggests a potential bullish breakout and a shift in long-term momentum, reinforcing the stock’s improving trend after a period of consolidation. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: Linde India Ltd. Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Linde India Ltd., a prominent player in the Other Chemical products sector, has recently formed a Golden Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development is widely regarded as a bullish signal, suggesting a potential trend reversal and a shift towards sustained long-term momentum for the mid-cap company. Time: 30 minutes ago

item.title: NIIT Learning Systems Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Underperformance
item.description: NIIT Learning Systems Ltd has touched a fresh 52-week low, closing near Rs 286, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid ongoing challenges in performance and market sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Aeroflex Neu Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Underperformance
item.description: Aeroflex Neu Ltd, a micro-cap player in the packaging sector, has touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs 62, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downtrend. The stock’s recent performance reflects ongoing pressures, with the share price falling sharply over the past year and underperforming key market benchmarks. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Fino Payments Bank Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Shares of Fino Payments Bank Ltd have declined to a fresh 52-week low, closing near Rs 136, marking a significant downturn for the small-cap fintech company amid a challenging market environment and subdued financial performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Shalby Ltd. Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Shalby Ltd., a player in the hospital sector, has recently touched a 52-week low price of ₹137, marking a significant decline in its stock value. This new low comes amid a sustained downward trend, with the stock closing just 1.79% above this level and underperforming its sector and broader market indices. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Jayant Agro Organics Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Jayant Agro Organics Ltd, a player in the Specialty Chemicals sector, has reached a fresh 52-week low, reflecting ongoing pressures on its stock price. The share closed at a new low level on 17 Mar 2026, continuing a downward trajectory that has persisted over recent sessions. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: TTK Healthcare Ltd. Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Underperformance
item.description: TTK Healthcare Ltd. has reached a significant milestone by touching its 52-week low price of Rs 807.05, marking a notable decline in the stock’s valuation over the past year. This drop reflects ongoing challenges in the company’s financial performance and market positioning within the diversified sector. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Indoco Remedies Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Underperformance
item.description: Indoco Remedies Ltd has recently touched a 52-week low, closing just 1.65% above its lowest price of Rs 188, marking a significant decline in the stock’s valuation over the past year. This development comes amid a backdrop of persistent financial headwinds and subdued market performance within the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector. Time: 2 hours ago
